description: Resource stream header diagnostics prove slot+7 buffer is 0x14067dc00 stream

The resource header was resource_header0=0xfc and resource_header_map=0xa010000; first qwords were [0a010000000000fc, 0000000000000000, 112195ba5291192b, a015dbf056e76cc2, ffffffff00000000, ...]. This confirms the buffer is the 0x14067dc00 native stream, not raw USER_DATA/FACE-layout bytes. No MODAL-CONFIRM-DISABLED, b80_deserialize_67b290, continue_confirm, or world-stable proof occurred; watcher ended timeout_seconds_budget_exhausted with expected_save_match=false and simulated_button_presses_total=0.
